svg.title: JARVIS complete tech stack diagram
svg.desc: All layers of the JARVIS multi-agent AI system from input to output

g.text: Voice · Telegram · Web UI · Terminal · Whisper STT
Raw input → clean JSON · Groq Llama 3.1 8B · <50ms
Saves JSON snapshot · Supabase PostgreSQL · SQLite local cache
Complex orchestration · Kimi K2.5 NVIDIA NIM · 256K context
All agent JSON outputs saved · Supabase realtime sync
Kimi K2.5 merges all agent results into one response
JSON → natural language · language + tone detection · Groq
Coqui TTS voice · Telegram message · Web UI · Terminal
